evaluators.name: Immediate Home-to-Station Cheapest Economy Cash Ride Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user booked an immediate cash ride from Home (123 Maple Street) to Downtown Central Station in economy, using the cheapest qualifying economy option under $20 generated by a runtime ride search.

evaluators.name: Scheduled Sedan Airport Ride with Promo Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user scheduled a sedan ride from a residential address to the airport for 8:30, applied a sedan-eligible promo, and chose the cheapest sedan option with discounted fare under $35, paying by card.

evaluators.name: Multi-Stop Minivan/XL Cheapest Under $40 Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user arranged a multi-stop immediate trip for 3 passengers from a street address via a shopping mall to a park, filtered for vehicles with at least 4 seats, paid by card, and chose the cheapest Minivan/XL option under $40.

evaluators.name: Save Home/Work and Book from Work to Library in Standard Taxi Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user saved Home and Work addresses, started an immediate booking from the saved Work address to a library, and proceeded to an upcoming standard taxi trip for that route.

evaluators.name: Highest-Rated Wheelchair-Accessible Afternoon Ride Under $30 Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user booked a scheduled ride this afternoon from a clinic to a community center in a wheelchair-accessible vehicle under $30, after filtering for wheelchair accessibility, sorting by rating high-to-low, and choosing the highest-rated qualifying option.

evaluators.name: Modify Upcoming Airport Ride Time and Vehicle Category Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the earliest upcoming scheduled airport ride was updated so that pickup time is 8:45 and the vehicle category is upgraded from economy to standard, preserving its upcoming status.

evaluators.name: Cancel Earliest Upcoming Ride with Wallet Credit Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the trip that was earliest among all future rides was cancelled with a change-of-plans reason and wallet credit refund method.

evaluators.name: Support Ticket for Overcharged Most Recent Trip Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user created a billing support ticket for the most recent completed trip with issue 'fare higher than expected' and contacted support via in-app chat or message, and also sent a user message on that ticket.
